tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: The Toyota Camry is one of the most popular mid-size sedans in the world known for reliability, comfort and fuel efficiency.

tab2.title: Specifications
tab2.content: The Camry is available with petrol, hybrid and modern safety technologies including adaptive cruise control and lane assist.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Toyota Camry has been one of the best selling cars in the United States for many years.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Tesla Model S is a fully electric luxury sedan known for its advanced technology and high performance.

tab2.title: Specifications
tab2.content: The Model S offers long driving range, autopilot features and extremely fast acceleration.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: The Model S Plaid version can accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in under 2 seconds.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: BMW M3 is a high performance sports sedan developed by BMW's M division.

tab2.title: Specifications
tab2.content: The M3 features powerful turbocharged engines, advanced suspension and precision handling.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: The BMW M3 has been a symbol of performance driving since its introduction in the 1980s.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Ford Mustang is one of the most iconic American muscle cars known for its powerful engines and sporty design.

tab2.title: Specifications
tab2.content: The Mustang offers multiple engine options including turbocharged and V8 engines.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: The Mustang has appeared in many movies and is a symbol of American automotive culture.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: The Lamborghini Aventador is a high performance supercar known for its aggressive design and powerful V12 engine.

tab2.title: Specifications
tab2.content: It features advanced aerodynamics, all wheel drive and extremely fast acceleration.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: The Aventador is one of Lamborghini's most famous flagship supercars.
